carousel.title: Full Stack Development
carousel.text: I have built multiple web pages & mobile apps for projects such as this one.

carousel.title: APIs & databases
carousel.text: Full design process and integration of services with Spring Boot / NestJS over SQL databases, from the E/R diagram to deployment.

carousel.title: Experience on SaaS
carousel.text: I have deployed multiple web pages and apps on the cloud (mainly AWS) with full functionality and minimal hiccups during deployment.

carousel.title: Collaborative
carousel.text: Throughout my career I have almost always worked in a team & had the opportunity to work with amazing & wonderful people who I have learned a lot from.

AboutSection.title: About me
AboutSection.about_me: I am known for maintaining a positive attitude and fostering a pleasant work environment. I have a strong ability to solve problems and tackle challenges with perseverance, always staying motivated and committed until I achieve my goals.

projects.nombre: Personal portfolio with React Native + Expo (web)
projects.descripcion: Responsive website built with Expo Router and react-native-web, deployed on GitHub Pages.
Web page design for learning React and its characteristics in depth. Only in Spanish ATM.

descriptions.TypeScript: Typed superset of JavaScript that catches errors early and scales large codebases.
descriptions.Python: Versatile language for scripting, automation, data and back-end services.
descriptions.JavaScript: The language of the web, used for interactive front-ends and Node.js back-ends.
descriptions.Java: Robust, object-oriented language widely used for enterprise back-ends.
descriptions.Html: Markup language that defines the structure and content of web pages.
descriptions.Css: Styles and lays out web pages: colors, spacing and responsive design.
descriptions.PostgreSQL: Powerful open-source relational database with advanced SQL features.
descriptions.MariaDB: Open-source relational database, a community-driven fork of MySQL.
descriptions.Oracle: Enterprise relational database used in large, mission-critical systems.
descriptions.MySQL: Popular open-source relational database for web applications.
descriptions.React Native: Framework for building native mobile (and web) apps with React.
descriptions.Docker: Packages apps into containers so they run the same anywhere.
descriptions.Springboot: Java framework for building REST APIs and back-end services quickly.
descriptions.NodeJS: JavaScript runtime for building fast, scalable server-side apps.
descriptions.NestJS: Structured Node.js framework for building maintainable back-ends.
descriptions.Npm: Package manager for JavaScript to install and manage dependencies.
descriptions.Expo: Toolkit that speeds up building and deploying React Native apps.
descriptions.AWS: Amazon's cloud platform for hosting, storage and deploying services.
descriptions.Maven: Build and dependency management tool for Java projects.
descriptions.Gradle: Flexible build automation tool for Java and Android projects.
descriptions.Git: Version control system to track changes and collaborate on code.
descriptions.Github: Platform to host Git repositories and collaborate on projects.
